name: Sesame Chicken with Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except broccoli and lemon in a bowl.
2. Cover and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
3. Heat a wok or skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Stir-fry the chicken mixture and broccoli for 15 minutes or until the broccoli is just tender. Do not overcook.
5. Serve with fresh lemon wedges.
